frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: These days a sensible young man should think of a prenup before marriage. Aajkal the laws are so one-sided, one allegation and the boy's family is dragged through court, and after divorce the man is expected to keep paying as if marriage has become reverse dowry. I am not saying every woman is like that, but many are looking more at security and settlement than at the marriage itself.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while casting men as the primary victims of biased laws. It encodes the 'reverse dowry' alimony framing, suspicion of women's motives, and the 'one-sided laws/498A misuse' style grievance.
original_frame: Motherhood as Basis of Respect, Women Defined by Male Relations
persona_text: You are Rajan. Age 55. Married. A retired army officer in Pune. Your son just told you that his wife Meera wants to go back to work full time now that their child is two years old. Meera has arranged a daycare near their house. Your son seems okay with it. You are sitting with your son in the study after Meera has gone to bed. You are telling your son what you think about Meera's decision and what a mother's presence means to a child in the first five years and what kind of man lets his wife put their child in daycare so she can go back to a job.
